doc: Per (backend, profile) cold-start TAX budget in milliseconds. startup_tax_ms = (molt_cold_total - molt_warm_total) * 1000 is the fixed startup cost molt pays on the cold path that the warm steady-state does not. A cell whose startup_tax_ms EXCEEDS budget_ms is FAIL_COLD_BUDGET (a startup regression, routed to the cold-start lane — NOT an execution-engine red). v0 = the measured baseline from the authoritative origin/main board (council ruling A: 'v0 = current measured baseline; near-term = no regression from baseline'). The budget is a CEILING on the tax, NOT on cold_total. release-output native Y1 target: startup_tax < 100ms AND cold_total <= CPython cold_total.

native/release-fast.basis: v0 — seed from the authoritative board's measured per-cell startup_tax_ms (p90 across the core suite + headroom). Until seeded, FAIL_COLD_BUDGET cannot fire and the measured tax is recorded so the ceiling can be set.

native/release-output.basis: v0 — release-output is the shipped artifact; council Y1 target is startup_tax < 100ms. Seed from the measured release-output board, then ratchet toward 100ms.

llvm/release-fast.basis: v0 — seed from the authoritative board's measured LLVM startup_tax_ms.
